title: Dracula Done to Death
description: It’s not new. It’s not original. It isn’t even very interesting. Dracula as you’ve never seen him before. Dead.
alt2: a coffin with a sign that says “Don’t open until X-mas”
alt3: two guys looking into a coffin, one guy is holding a hammer and stake
alt4: there is a skeleton in the coffin with a stake through its chest
